coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 22-group, 559-node closure.
validation: All three authored validation branches now match Blender in vertex count, face count, and four-decimal bounds: the solid and curve preview are 97,784 / 97,776, while the flattened surface is 48,896 / 46,866. The browser also matches the 508-point Spiro repeat and the complete 59,872 / 46,866 Marching Squares join. Blur Attribute follows Blender's float32 accumulation and reciprocal-multiply path across all 665 Sigilize passes, and region extrusion applies Blender's +Z fallback normal to the four retained zero-area boundary triangles. Browser material reconstruction follows the extracted chrome.003 contract: linear 0.8 base color, Metallic 1, and Noise/Map Range multiplied by the face-domain rough attribute. The authored evaluated mesh stores rough=0 everywhere, so the procedural grain is dormant and the result has no emission, bump, alpha, clearcoat, or displacement contribution.

materialx.reason: Graph semantics and live geometry binding pass; Eevee and MaterialX FIS zero-roughness reflection pixels remain measurably different.
